title: Advisory Board - ICBAB 2026
content: Advisory Board Our distinguished panel of International and National experts guiding ICBAB-2026. International Advisory Board Prof. Brigitte Vannier Universite de Poitiers, France Prof. Holger Frohlich University of Bonn, Germany Prof. Su Shiung Lam Universiti Malaysia Terengganu, Institute of Tropical Aquaculture and Fisheries (AKUATROP), Malaysia Dr. Ahmed Moussa Abdelmalek Essaadi University, Morocco Prof. Dr. Moacyr Comar Junior Instituto de Química, Universidade Federal Uberlândia, Brazil Dr. Vinod Kumar Cranfield University, UK Dr. Yash Gupta Penn State Health Milton S. Hershey Medical Center, USA National Advisory Board Prof. Pritish Kumar Varadwaj Professor Dept. Bioinformatics & Biomedical Engineering, IIIT, Allahabad Dr. Anshu Bhardwaj Scientist F IMTECH Chandigarh Prof. (Dr.) Gajendra P. S. Raghava Professor IIIT Delhi Dr. Harpreet Singh Professor Hans Raj Mahila Maha Vidyalaya, Jalandhar Dr. Vikram Singh Assistant Professor Central University of Himachal Pradesh, Dharamshala Dr. Vikas Srivastava Scientist, Developmental Toxicology Indian Institute of Toxicology Research, Lucknow Dr. Gyanendra Singh Scientist National Institute of Occupational Health (ICMR), Ahmedabad Dr. Nasib Singh Associate Professor & HOD Department of Microbiology, Eternal University, Baru Sahib Dr. Sushila D. Negi Professor & Head Department of Microbiology, Himachal Pradesh University, Shimla Dr. Tek Chand Bhalla Ex. Head and Professor Department of Biotechnology, Himachal Pradesh University, Shimla
